body.title: One-time design pass: fill telemetry contracts for top 15 skills
body.result: 15 skill telemetry contracts written to adc.palace at theigors/skill-telemetry/contracts/<name>; forget-flags + improvement-metrics for each
body.description:
One-time design pass: fill in the two-field contract for the 15 highest-priority skills (constraint-path first). Output is palace nodes, not code.

**Proposed shape:** For each skill: read SKILL.md, identify forget-flags (rules the skill encodes that CC demonstrably violates) and improvement metrics (measurable postconditions). Write one palace node per skill at `theigors/skill-telemetry/contracts/<skill-name>`. Priority order: decided, sprint-ticket, audit-ticket, audit-design, context-load, sprint-batch, savestate, audit-feedback, audit-hypothesis, day-close, commit, ticket, audit-expert, note, audit-debris.

**Affected files:** palace nodes only (15 new nodes)
**Design rules:** none apply — palace write only
**Scope boundary:** Design pass only; no code changes to SKILL.md files
**Test plan:** no tests — palace writes; verify nodes exist and contain both fields
